clause_summary: Complete design; procurement; fabrication; erection; commissioning of 60 TPH AFBC boiler at Dalmia Cement Ariyalur
key_terms: Turnkey basis; single-point responsibility; performance guarantee
obligations_thermax: Deliver within 18 months from LOI; achieve guaranteed parameters
obligations_counterparty: Provide site access; utilities; civil foundation per Thermax specifications

clause_summary: Total contract value INR 28.5 Cr; milestone-based payment schedule
key_terms: Fixed price; subject to statutory tax changes only; 8 milestones
obligations_thermax: Deliver against milestones; submit running bills with progress certificates
obligations_counterparty: Pay within 30 days of certified invoice; advance 15% against BG
penalty_provision: Interest at SBI PLR + 2% for payments delayed beyond 45 days
notes: Price escalation excluded — risk on Thermax for material cost increases

clause_summary: Completion in 18 months from LOI; key milestones at 6/12/15/18 months
key_terms: Time is of the essence; mutually agreed schedule; extension for FM only
obligations_thermax: Meet milestone dates; provide monthly progress reports
obligations_counterparty: Provide approvals within 15 days; no scope changes without formal VO
notes: Tight schedule; limited buffer for procurement delays

clause_summary: LD at 0.5% of contract value per week of delay; capped at 5%
key_terms: Cap: INR 1.425 Cr (5% of 28.5 Cr); no LD for delays attributable to client
obligations_thermax: Deliver on time; document all client-caused delays immediately
obligations_counterparty: Grant time extension for legitimate force majeure or client delays
notes: Significant financial exposure — ensure robust project controls

clause_summary: Boiler efficiency ≥87% on NCV basis; steam purity; emissions per CPCB
key_terms: PG test per ASME PTC 4; within 60 days of commissioning; Thermax bears test cost
obligations_thermax: Meet guaranteed parameters; rectify at own cost if failed; re-test once
obligations_counterparty: Provide fuel as per design specification; stable load during PG test
penalty_provision: Proportionate price reduction if efficiency shortfall 1-3%; rejection right if >3%
notes: Critical clause — engineering must validate design margins

clause_summary: 18 months from mechanical completion or 12 months from commissioning whichever earlier
key_terms: Covers defects in design; material; workmanship; excludes wear parts and misuse
obligations_thermax: Repair/replace defective items at own cost during warranty; respond within 48 hours for critical defects
obligations_counterparty: Report defects promptly; provide access for repair; maintain equipment per O&M manual
penalty_provision: No specific penalty; extension of warranty for repaired items by 6 months
notes: Standard warranty; ensure spare parts availability during warranty period

clause_summary: Standard FM events — natural disasters; war; strikes; epidemic; govt. actions
key_terms: 30-day notification; 90-day continuous FM allows termination by either party
obligations_thermax: Notify within 30 days; demonstrate FM impact; resume work within 7 days of FM cessation
obligations_counterparty: Grant time extension for FM period; no LD during FM
penalty_provision: No penalty during FM; costs borne by respective parties
notes: Pandemic/epidemic specifically included per post-COVID standard

clause_summary: Either party may terminate for material breach after 60-day cure period
key_terms: Client may terminate for convenience on 30-day notice with payment for work done + 5% margin
obligations_thermax: On convenience termination — return client property; hand over documentation; de-mobilize within 30 days
obligations_counterparty: Pay for work completed + 5% on balance; pay for materials procured/in transit
penalty_provision: On Thermax default — client may engage alternate contractor; recover excess cost from Thermax
notes: Termination for convenience clause creates financial risk; monitor client satisfaction closely
